summary: Phase 2 Features Test Complete - Backend: 19/19 passed (100%), Frontend: All Phase 2 features working. Kinship Map with network graph and Legacy Threads with category filters/comments verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed ThreadCreateRequest model - was missing category, elder_name, voice_note_data_url fields
Fixed ThreadPublic model - was missing category, elder_name, voice_note_data_url, author_name fields
All Phase 2 APIs working correctly after model fix

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Phase 2 UI features verified working

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed kinship relationships and threads - cleanup runs at test end
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully tested and working. Kinship Map at /kinship-map shows network graph using react-force-graph-2d with add/delete relationships. Legacy Threads at /legacy-threads has New Thread form with category selection, thread list with category filters, and comment system. Both pages accessible via sidebar navigation.

phase2_kinship: GET /api/kinship/graph - returns nodes/links/relationship_types for graph viz
GET /api/kinship/groups - returns grouped relationships by type
Frontend Add Relationship form works (opens, fills, submits)
Frontend Network graph renders with react-force-graph-2d
Frontend Relationship list shows all relationships with delete buttons
Frontend Legend shows relationship types with colors
phase2_legacy_threads: POST /api/threads - creates thread with category, elder_name, body
Frontend New Thread form works with category dropdown
Frontend Category filters work (filter by category, clear filter)
Frontend Thread cards show category badges with colors
phase2_navigation: Legacy Threads link visible in sidebar
Kinship Map link visible in sidebar
Navigation routes correctly to both pages
regression_phase1: Activity Feed page loads and works
Gatherings page has inline edit buttons
Timeline page has Export CSV button

ThreadCreateRequest_model.issue: Model was missing category, elder_name, voice_note_data_url fields causing 500 error on POST /api/threads
ThreadCreateRequest_model.fix: Added category, elder_name, voice_note_data_url fields to ThreadCreateRequest and ThreadPublic models
